page: UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-240GB-1xH100 is a GPU-accelerated virtual server built on the KVM hypervisor. The hardware configuration consists of 12 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 8462Y+ processor running at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. It features 12 physical cores with a single thread per core under a shared CPU allocation model. The system is equipped with 240.0 GB of RAM, yielding a high resource density of 20.0 GB of memory per core. Graphics and parallel processing acceleration are delivered by a single NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 80 GB of dedicated VRAM. Local storage is not bundled with this instance type.

Benchmark data shows strong single-core CPU performance, with stress-ng single-core metrics in the top 25% and top-tier single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression speeds. Multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth benchmarks fall within the average tier. The primary performance highlight is the GPU-accelerated LLM inference capability, which achieves top-tier speeds of 10515.12 tokens per second for prompt processing and 547.27 tokens per second for text generation on small models.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this server represents a premium, resource-dense allocation. It is highly efficient for workloads that can fully utilize the massive parallel processing capabilities of the NVIDIA Hopper architecture and the large 240 GB memory footprint. Because local storage is absent, users must factor in external storage configurations. This server is best suited for deep learning, large language model inference, AI model training, complex data science pipelines, and GPU-accelerated scientific simulations.
description: UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-240GB-1xH100 is a GPU-accelerated virtual server featuring 12 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon 8462Y+ processors at 2.0 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 240.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 20.0 GB per core, and includes a dedicated NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 80 GB of VRAM. Local storage is not included. Benchmarks indicate strong single-core CPU performance alongside top-tier single-threaded compression and decompression speeds. The NVIDIA H100 GPU delivers top-tier LLM inference capabilities, making this instance highly efficient for specialized AI workloads. This server is optimized for machine learning, large language model inference, data science, and GPU-accelerated scientific computing.
og_description: UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-240GB-1xH100 is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 12 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 240 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPU with 80 GB VRAM, optimized for high-performance AI and machine learning workloads.
meta_description: UpCloud GPU-12xCPU-240GB-1xH100 features 12 Intel vCPUs, 240 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA H100 GPU for high-performance AI and LLM inference workloads.
tagline: A high-density GPU instance featuring an NVIDIA Hopper H100 and 240 GB RAM for demanding artificial intelligence and machine learning workloads.

12 Intel Xeon 8462Y+ vCPUs with 240 GB of system memory
Top-tier LLM inference performance for prompt processing and text generation
